title: Priyan Ottathilanu
description: Priyan Ottathilanu (transl. Priyan is on the run) is a 2022 Indian Malayalam-language comedy drama film directed by Antony Sony. The story, screenplay and dialogues are written by Abhayakumar K and Anil Kurian. It is produced by Santhosh Thrivikraman under the company WOW Cinemas. The film stars Sharafudheen, Nyla Usha and Aparna Das in the lead roles. The story revolves around Priyan, a young man who is always busy.[1] [2] [3] Mammootty appears in a cameo role in the film.[4]
